title: Meshcore-proxy | Enables TCP and WebSockets to a BLE companion node

messages.author: marius T
messages.text: Hi all, i've put together a relatively simple CLI utility that allows TCP and WebSocket connections over the LAN to reach a BLE connected companion node. I've found it quite handy already. https://github.com/andrewheadricke/meshcore-proxy For example you can connect your LiamCottle Meshcore app and also have a bot permanently connected at the same time. WebSocket support is very handy for vanilla web apps to access the companion radio. No need for WebBLE or WebSerial dialog windows. I have a PR to include WebSocket support in the official meshcore.js library but I need some more "advocates" to get it merged
messages.content_html:
Hi all, i've put together a relatively simple CLI utility that allows TCP and WebSocket connections over the LAN to reach a BLE connected companion node. I've found it quite handy already.
  • https://github.com/andrewheadricke/meshcore-proxy
For example you can connect your LiamCottle Meshcore app and also have a bot permanently connected at the same time. WebSocket support is very handy for vanilla web apps to access the companion radio. No need for WebBLE or WebSerial dialog windows. I have a PR to include WebSocket support in the official meshcore.js library but I need some more "advocates" to get it merged
